title: Project Miner Temp Power Field Authorization Assignment Live Admission
authority_basis: Jason's 2026-05-18 standing PM blocker authority as repo technical authority and project stakeholder.
objective: Clear the post-import field authorization and assignment blocker for the imported Project Miner Temp Power work rows without opening downstream schedule/status, durable field record, production, customer, or finance writes.
preconditions: PM Lane 277 approval row reads back as approved_for_import_packet.
PM Lane 278 import reads back as imported with current_candidate_match=true and counts_match=true.
Hosted reads show 7 workpackages, 15 tasks, 184 apparatus rows, and 0 assignments before the PM Lane 279 write.
Seeded crew reads show tech-001 Alex Rivera, tech-002 Sam Chen, and tech-003 Jordan Bell.
scope: Use the existing POST /api/v1/mutations/assignments application path.
Use lead actor role, online source, mutation class B, and deterministic idempotency keys.
Create one assignment row for each imported Temp Power apparatus row.
Embed field authorization metadata on every assignment payload.
Use deterministic load balancing by lowest assigned planned hours, then assignment count, then tech id.
Patch the PM workfront read model so assignment-row owners count for readiness even when apparatus.assigned_to is not denormalized.
not_allowed: No task, workpackage, or apparatus status mutation.
No customer report or customer commitment.
No billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance output.
No source workbook or PDF writeback.
No new service, DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
No autonomous AI business-state mutation beyond the assignment write explicitly admitted here.
validation_plan: Hosted assignment readback: 184 assignments, 184 unique apparatus, all downstream authorities not_admitted.
Hosted assignment replay: idempotent_hit with no duplicate assignment rows.
Hosted PM workfront readback after Render deploy: unassigned_count=0 and ready_count=184.
Hosted smokes: deployed mutation-seam smoke, hosted PM intake smoke, hosted operations routes smoke.
validation_result: PASS: focused mutation-seam PM workfront tests passed, project import persistence tests passed, hosted assignment write accepted 184 rows, replay returned 184 idempotent_hit responses with assignment_count_after=184, hosted PM workfront returned unassigned_count=0 and ready_count=184 after Render auto-deploy, deployed mutation-seam smoke returned RESULT PASS, hosted PM intake smoke returned PM_INTAKE_HOSTED_SUMMARY failed=0, hosted operations routes smoke returned SMOKE_SUMMARY failed=0 passed=12, and scoped git diff checks passed.
next_recommended_lane: After PM Lane 279 closeout, the next blocker is the schedule/status mutation admission packet. Durable field records, production tracking, customer reporting, and finance remain blocked until separate packets.
